title: malache rigida
intro: Malache rigida, also known as American mandrake, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Papaveraceae and is native to North America. The root of the Malache rigida plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Malache rigida include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as pain relief and improved digestion. Malache rigida can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
